$jsonSchema.title: Interventions
$jsonSchema.description: A specific therapeutic intervention administered within one arm of one trial. Belongs to exactly one arm within one trial — has no clinical meaning outside that context. Referenced by adverse_events.intervention_id.

trial_id.description: Reference to clinical_trials.trial_id. Required — an intervention without a trial context has no meaning.

arm_label.description: Must match an arm_label in the parent trial's arms array. This is the field used to trace an adverse event to its arm: AE -> intervention_id -> this arm_label.

name.description: Generic or brand name, e.g. Pembrolizumab, Placebo saline, Metformin 500mg.

mechanism.description: Optional short description, e.g. PD-1 checkpoint inhibitor.

target_gene.description: HGNC gene symbol, e.g. EGFR, BRCA1, TP53, PD-L1. Null if not applicable.

target_protein.description: UniProt-style name, e.g. Programmed cell death protein 1 (PD-1). Null if not applicable.
